creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a patch to your modified shar file which was send to me as
private e-mail.
This patch substitutes WWWDIR to its value.
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/using-sub-files.html

By the way, we forget to set CONFLICTS among www/wordpress, german/wordpress,
chinese/wordpress-zh_CN, chinese/wordpress-zh_TW and
japanese/wordpress, don't we?
Or to avoid conflicts, we can set different value to WWWDIR each other such as
www/tdiary and japanese/tdiary.

Please reconsider and send-pr to solve above the conflicts, if you can.

Thanks in advance,

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
